name: lab-sidecar
description: Use Lab-Sidecar from Codex as a local-first experiment and artifact sidecar.

interface.longDescription: Lab-Sidecar helps Codex delegate long-running experiment, metrics, figure, report, and slide work into local task artifacts while returning bounded summaries to the main thread.
defaultPrompt: Use Lab-Sidecar to run this experiment and summarize artifacts
Generate figures, report, and slides for these results
